notes: Strengthens mobile/PWA branding metadata so Pathmark app name and icons are preferred over Streamlit defaults where the browser allows it.
Adds a proper Pathmark manifest with app id, display override, mobile icon references and cache-busted icon paths.
Separates seasonal theme choice from light/dark appearance by applying light and dark variants for each seasonal theme.
Adds a browser-side appearance watcher so Pathmark can react when the Streamlit Settings menu changes between Light, Dark and System without needing a full app rerun.
Adds a manual theme refresh fallback in Settings for mobile browsers that cache display state.
release: v0.6.37 Mobile branding and theme variant repair
release_name: Mobile branding and theme variant repair
release_notes: Repairs mobile/PWA branding metadata and makes Pathmark seasonal themes respond to Streamlit Light/Dark/System appearance changes.
label: Mobile branding and theme variant repair
